properties.name: Carrere Memorial
properties.what_to_bring: iPhone 12 Pro+ / iPad Pro with LiDAR, or DSLR with 50+ overlapping photos
properties.how_to_contribute: Use iPhone/iPad LiDAR (Polycam, Scaniverse, 3d Scanner App) or DSLR + Meshroom/RealityCapture. Capture from all angles including top. Export as GLB, real-world scale in metres, decimated to <100K triangles.
properties.how_to_submit: GitHub PR: add GLB to models/contributions/{name}.glb
properties.size_hint: Life-size or larger statue. Walk slowly around all sides.

properties.size_hint: Small (~0.5-1m). iPhone LiDAR works well at this scale.

properties.name: The Mall / Literary Walk — American Elms
properties.description: Iconic double-row American Elm canopy, one of the largest surviving stands in North America. ~150 elms form a cathedral-like vault; census captured ~44.
properties.what_to_bring: Phone with GPS + tape measure
properties.how_to_contribute: Walk the area with phone GPS. For each tree record: latitude, longitude, species (common name), trunk diameter at chest height (cm), estimated height (m). Use a tape measure for trunk diameter.
properties.how_to_submit: GitHub issue or PR: add CSV to data/tree_surveys/{area}.csv

properties.name: All 6557 buildings — facade only
properties.description: All 6557 buildings use procedural facades from OSM footprints + heights. Real 3D geometry from NYC CityGML LOD2 dataset would replace these.
properties.what_to_bring: QGIS, FME, or Python with citygml4j
properties.how_to_contribute: Source CityGML LOD2 models from NYC DoITT 3D Building Model dataset or NYC Open Data PLUTO/MapPLUTO for footprints + heights. Convert to GLB with real-world coordinates.
properties.how_to_submit: GitHub issue with data source link and conversion script
